title: senecio oberprieleri
intro: Senecio oberprieleri, also known as the Senecio oberprieleri plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Senecio oberprieleri include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Senecio oberprieleri can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to note that its usage should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
